# Dibbayajyoti Roy — Personal Portfolio

> Full Stack Software Engineer specializing in Rust, React, and Next.js. Based in Agartala, Tripura, India.

## Pages

- [Homepage](https://dibbayajyoti.com): Personal landing page with interactive hero section showcasing engineering skills and approach.
- [Work](https://dibbayajyoti.com/work): Full professional profile — experience, projects, technical skills, hackathon wins, and career philosophy.

## About

Dibbayajyoti Roy is a Full Stack Software Engineer currently working at Yupcha Softwares Pvt. Ltd. He builds production-grade SaaS platforms, integrates REST APIs, and creates user-facing dashboards. He is a B.Tech Computer Science candidate at ICFAI University Tripura (Class of 2026).

He specializes in TypeScript, React, Next.js, Node.js, and Rust for systems programming. Notable hackathon wins include the NITA Arjuna 2.0 National Hackathon (2025) and 1st Runner-Up at the NITA–ISRO Space Hackathon (2024).

## Projects

- **EMS**: Real-time Employee Management System built with Rust and React (payroll, policy management)
- **LunarSite**: AI-based lunar mineral prediction system using ML pipelines (NITA-ISRO hackathon)
- **BloodLink**: Matching platform for blood donors and seekers with real-time discovery
- **CarbonFootprintTracker**: AI-powered sustainability app calculating individual emissions
